stories: Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the nineteenth of May
Fun fact: on this day in 1999, Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace opened in cinemas — twenty-seven years ago today
Still one of the most debated blockbusters ever made
Bi-monthly catch-up with Paula on Webex at two this afternoon, forty-five minutes
Then a Safe Start call at eleven PM — that's the Canada team on their morning, easy to forget
The annual US-Singapore military exercise Tiger Balm has concluded successfully at Yakima in Washington — another quiet signal of how solid that alliance remains
Grammy winner Laufey is performing at the Singapore Indoor Stadium tonight if anyone wants a Tuesday out
And weather: afternoon thunderstorms likely through the rest of May, high around 30 degrees, low 27
Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday the nineteenth of May, 2026
Fun fact: the Anglo-Saxons called May the Month of Three Milkings
Spring grass was so rich that cows could genuinely be milked three times a day
You're on Day Three of the GBSLT Quarterly in Manila
Work calendar didn't sync this morning, but from the family side: Zain has Maths and English today, and Kensie's at Kumon at five
Library books are due back today - worth flagging to the home team
In Singapore, the total fertility rate has hit a fresh record low
Despite years of pro-family policies, housing costs and career pressures keep moving the numbers the wrong way
